name: F1 Actual Forecast Producer v1
purpose: Generate actual gate/lane forecast rows from available source-closure and engine-policy inputs before the Forecast Gate Source Writer and Forecast Bundle Locker run.
no_source_behavior: exit cleanly and create runtime audit artifact only; do not commit placeholder forecast rows
notes: This workflow produces forecast rows, but blind-valid status only exists if the rows are locked before outcome by Forecast Bundle Locker.
Race-result and post-event gates are scoring/attribution gates and should not rewrite pre-race forecasts.
Experimental challenger rows are generated as challenger/risk overlay rows only and must not overwrite stable exact P1-P20 outputs.
